name: Davinci MIQRO-C Sesh Pack
summary: Davinci MIQRO-C Sesh Pack — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: The DaVinci MIQRO-C Sesh Pack is an official accessory kit assembled to support the ongoing maintenance and portability of the DaVinci MIQRO-C Vaporiser. Designed for everyday use and long-term care, this bundle includes essential tools and spare components that help keep the device operating efficiently. Created to match the MIQRO-C’s ultra-compact design, the Sesh Pack enables quick cleaning, reduces wear-related downtime, and improves convenience for users who value reliability on the go. Product details and compatibility are based on official DaVinci specifications and verified accessory supply through Retail North. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
